title: Personal jurisdiction attack plan
bullets: Start with statutory authorization, then test due process.
Identify traditional bases before moving to minimum contacts.
For specific jurisdiction, work through purposeful availment, relatedness, and fairness.

title: Venue and transfer sequence
bullets: Ask first whether venue is proper under § 1391.
If venue is improper, think § 1406 dismissal or transfer.
If venue is proper but inconvenient, analyze § 1404 or forum non conveniens.

title: Erie issue-spotting checklist
bullets: Identify whether the court sits in diversity or supplemental jurisdiction applying state law.
Ask whether a federal directive directly answers the question.
If not, discuss outcome determination, forum shopping, inequitable administration, and countervailing federal interests.
